reason: Successfully sent a message to QA-20260319-180407-537w agent and verified it responded with "4" to the math query.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing three agents.
Found and clicked agent "QA-20260319-180407-537w" in the sidebar — Agent page opened showing the agent with status "idle".
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status displayed as "idle" which satisfies the requirement.
Clicked message input field and typed "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message entered successfully in the input field.
Clicked send button to submit the message — Message was sent, agent status changed to "working" with activity indicator showing.
Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Agent responded within 3 seconds.
Verified the response mentions "4" — Response clearly displays "4." in the chat area. Took final screenshot confirming the complete interaction.
